Add grant

"Risk" flags grants whose current monthly personnel allocation, projected out to the end date, would substantially overshoot or undershoot the remaining balance -- a heads-up to rebalance allocations or spend down committed funds, not a hard rule. Adjust how sensitive this is on the Settings page.

{% if grants_json %}

Initial allocation (optional)

{% set show_student_picker = false %} {% include "_allocation_editor.html" %} {% endif %}

Picking a department fills in its default stipend; edit the amount to override it for this student. Manage department stipend/tuition/fringe rates on the Departments page. No personnel cost is projected for allocation months before the start date or after expected graduation. Optionally split their effort across one or more grants right away, or leave it unallocated and set it later.
